title: Fada Ngourma Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Fada Ngourma, with a Z-Score of +3.37. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Fada Ngourma is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 65%, and wind speed is at 18.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
